title: VOLUNTEERS AND DONATIONS - 211info
text: PRO-BONE-O VOLUNTEERS AND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides volunteer opportunities at a free veterinary clinic. No experience, medical or otherwise, is required. Also accepts donations of money, pet food, kennels, crates, and other items. 1509 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (541) 799-0441 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 607-8089 Message Phone Message Phone (541) 799-0441 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Go to the end of the street. Clinic is in the big red warehouse on the right side of 1st Ave. Signs at the Eugene Mission lead to the clinic's location in the warehouse. Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - VETERINARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PRO-BONE-O
